title: Initially
description: Initially starts you out with a configured set of items
body:
Initially is a mod that upon joining a world for the first time it initializes the players inventory with a list of items that have been configured in the config.

In the json you can specify per slot what item you want to be put there and what the tag data (nbt) of the item is (if it has any).

You can get the nbt of an item by holding it and running ``"/data get entity @s SelectedItem"``, copy the id and put it as the itemLocation then remove it from the tag same goes for the count.

Remember! You have to escape any nested strings before placing in the json (You can use This website to do it for you)

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
